label: Styled List
description: A styled list block for presenting items in bullet, numbered, or checklist format. Each item has a title and optional description. Use for feature lists, benefit highlights, requirements. Layout: vertical list with configurable markers, bold titles with optional description text.

items.title: Lightning Fast Performance
items.description: Optimized to deliver sub-50ms response times on every request.

items.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
items.description: End-to-end encryption, RBAC, and regular penetration testing.

items.title: Seamless Integrations
items.description: Connect with over 200 third-party tools and services out of the box.

items.title: 24/7 Dedicated Support
items.description: Our engineering team is available around the clock to assist you.

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Grows effortlessly from hundreds to millions of users without re-platforming.
